title: SMTP configuration for Mailersend not working
symptom: Users are unable to send emails from n8n using Mailersend SMTP settings, despite successful tests with Postfix.
not_this_if: SMTP settings are correct and emails are being sent successfully
root_cause: Mailersend requires specific SMTP settings, including the correct port and SSL configuration. If these settings are not properly configured, n8n will not be able to send emails.
fix_steps: Set the following environment variables in your n8n configuration: N8N_EMAIL_MODE=smtp, N8N_SMTP_HOST=smtp.mailersend.net, N8N_SMTP_PORT=587, N8N_SMTP_SSL=false, N8N_SMTP_USER=user-from-mailersend@my-domain.tld, N8N_SMTP_PASS=pass-from-mailersend, N8N_SMTP_SENDER=n8n@my-domain.tld.
Recreate the n8n container using the commands: docker-compose down and docker-compose up -d --build.
agent_instruction: Configure the SMTP settings for Mailersend and recreate the n8n container.
